publication.data_waiver_statement: CC0 applies to data made available in the article unless otherwise stated; this is not treated as an explicit license assignment for external SRA files
publication.status: linked by the NCBI SRA study record

strain_identity.status: Strain-B label agrees, but the archive ATCC secondary identifier conflicts with the publication and locked assembly

sources.strain_applicability: Strain-B label matches the primary-reference strain, but the ATCC identifier conflict is unresolved; not Strain-T

experimental_condition.biological_or_technical_replicate: R3; replicate type is not stated in the archive metadata

replicate_context.interpretation: two runs are explicitly labelled R1 and R3 and one is un-numbered; R2 was not returned by the BioSample query, and biological-versus-technical replicate type and completeness remain unknown

library.strand_specificity: explicitly stranded by library kit metadata
library.strand_orientation_convention: unknown; not stated by the archive metadata and not inferred

coordinate_identity.provenance_note: the publication states that de novo assembled transcript models were used for initial assembly and annotation; this source is a coordinate-positive control but not independent of the current annotation-generation process

independence.relationship: wet-lab transcript evidence with provenance overlap to the current assembly and initial annotation
independence.qualification: partial; not sufficient as the sole independent transcript source

license.qualification: unresolved; database access terms are known, but no explicit per-file license is inferred
license.interpretation: NCBI places no restrictions on database data use or distribution but cannot transfer rights claimed by submitters; the article CC BY/CC0 statements are not extended to the external SRA file without explicit evidence

qualification_reasons: Strain-B label, culture condition, stranded library kit, paired layout, read length and RIN gate are explicitly recorded
downloaded SRA Lite size and MD5 match the NCBI archive record and a local SHA-256 is recorded
archive ATCC 20879 conflicts with publication and assembly ATCC 20864
the transcript data contributed to initial assembly and annotation, so annotation independence is partial rather than passed
no explicit per-file SRA license is assigned; NCBI database usage terms are recorded but not promoted to a file license
strand orientation convention and replicate completeness remain unknown and must not be inferred
compatibility with locked GCA_001746955.1 coordinates remains pending a four-chromosome probe
